programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy races against time to win a locker and get home; Rene outspends the competition, but Darrell and Brandon manage to come out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey take on rival couple Jarrod and Brandi; Darrell wins an intriguing locker after dodging a bullet; Ivy encounters a furry friend.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod hopes that scoring more lockers will prevent Brandi from closing the store in Long Beach; Ivy attempts to intimidate the other bidders; Rene's cockiness could prove to be a detriment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Six lockers owned by one tenant go up for auction, spurring wild rumors and excitement; Barry finds a vintage magazine; Jarrod asks Dave for an appraisal.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A locker in Whittier, Calif., features a high payoff; Dave eyes a unit with a stockpile of antiques; Barry's locker may contain old weapons.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: State Troopers chase a drunk driver in an R-V as she causes multiple accidents while driving recklessly through busy city streets; a kidnapping and murder suspect fires at officers from inside his car; a wrong-way driver fleeing from State Troopers.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A wanted felon smashes into a state trooper's car while fleeing from local police and county deputies; police get into a shootout with a man wanted for murdering his roommate; a deputy's PIT maneuver knocks a fugitive's car up on two wheels.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: State Troopers become engaged in a gunfight with a suspected drug dealer; a K-9 officer runs down an alleged car thief who's fled on foot; police pursue a road rage suspect who's driving recklessly on wet, snow-filled streets; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Police exchange gunfire in the streets of Tampa with a man wanted for stabbing his wife; a State Trooper performs a PIT Maneuver on a fleeing hit-and-run suspect; police get in a chase with two men wanted for armed carjacking.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; police pursue a man driving his truck recklessly while towing a double-wide mobile home; a woman steals an officer's cruiser and rear-ends an SUV; officers engage in a bicycle pursuit.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Troopers engage in the high-speed chase of a wrong-way driver on a motorcycle; Local P-D and a K-9 officer track down a man reportedly in possession of a home-made bomb, Deputies in the multi-state pursuit of an ex-con warn Canadian authorities.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; a woman accused of shoplifting rams a police cruiser and leads officers on a dangerous high speed chase.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: After a long, high-speed chase, deputies discover a one-year-old girl in the back of the suspect's car; a Good Samaritan gives an out-of-breath officer a ride in his car to make up some ground during a foot pursuit.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked man allegedly steals an ATV; a man who apparently was feeding the alligators gets a visit from police; a man in Alaska robs a liquor store by smashing into the entrance with a stolen front-loader.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner's doorstep; a Jeweler locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive; police use a kid's bike to chase a suspect; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A woman turns shoplifting into a game of chance; a clumsy burglar botches a robbery attempt; a young driver suspected of a DUI denies guilt, but keeps chugging - in a most peculiar place.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man drives a car off a cliff trying to elude police; a waitress gets flirtatious with deputies; a shopper refuses to leave a store until she gets a price reduction.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A Florida tourist decides to take a scenic car drive through the ocean; a fugitive fleeing from police hides in plain sight; a neighborhood vandal wears the proof of her crimes.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country, a woman urinates in the street during a traffic stop; a pant-less man is arrested for allegedly robbing a donut shop; two women drive to a bank with a deceased man in the car; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man decides to interrupt his crime to make a pizza; police track down a man who jumped through the roof of a port-a-potty; an unwanted intruder is arrested after he fell asleep in the middle of a crime.

programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked woman attempts to elude police by jumping into the ocean; a man attacks a police car with a chainsaw; a woman claims her dad is Jesus Christ; and more!

programme.desc: Ally's constantly getting into bed with her parents, complaining about monsters in her room. Sleep-deprived Ray tries everything to solve the problem.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra discovers that her mother-in-law prefers Robert's girlfriend solely on the basis that she's a 'good girl', making Debra wonder what exactly a 'good girl' is.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis

programme.title: Matt Allwright

programme.title: Vanessa

programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate a murder case with several potential suspects when a porn movie producer is strangled with a bra at a DVD release party.

programme.title: Love Nature

programme.desc: Police bring in an abusive male under arrest who claims he has a racing heart, and two friends arrive in resus who have dislocated each other's shoulders during a friendly wrestle.
